name: Mushrooms and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Add mushrooms, peppers, and onions to a large non-stick pan.
2. Sauté over medium-high heat until onions are soft and golden. (If you don't have a non-stick pan, use a squirt of non-stick cooking spray.)
3. Add tomato sauce and one-third of the can of water.
4. Add spices (use the larger amount listed) and mix well.
5. Cover and cook over the lowest heat (simmer) for 20 minutes.
